$comment: Per-lifecycle-state chrome composition. The plugin reads workspace state.status, looks up the matching layout, and assembles the listed chrome components in order. The page body (widgets) comes separately from workspace/pages/<active-page>.json. See components/README.md for the component contract.

goal-defining.notes: Goal banner shows partial fields with empty markers. goal-form prompts for missing required fields. No page body yet — no stores exist.

contracts-drafting.notes: Goal locked in. blueprint-picker offers blueprints (or 'start blank'). contracts-preview shows the contracts being drafted. No page body until contracts are approved.

operating.notes: Chrome wraps the page body. page-body slot renders the active page's composition (workspace/pages/<active>.json).

wrapping-up.notes: Operating layout + wrap-banner indicating refusal of structural changes.

archived.notes: Read-only snapshot. archive-banner shows archive timestamp. Action affordances disabled.
